sourceSummary.oneLine: H&abyz Co., Ltd. declares no relationship, connection, or conflict of interest with evaluator Kim, Sunghyun.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Used as Appendix II technical documentation to document evaluator conflict-of-interest independence for H&abyz Co., Ltd.
keyPoints: Document No. is Appendix II and Rev. No. is 0.
Declaration of Interest Rev. Date is Dec 22, 2022.
H&abyz Co., Ltd. declares no relationship and connection with Evaluator Kim, Sunghyun regarding listed conflict-of-interest conditions.
The document states there is no conflict of interest between the Evaluator and H&abyz Co., Ltd.
